titles.title: I'm a Soldier in God's Army

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I’m a soldier in God’s army, I am marching straight to victory, I will not give up, I will not turn around, I’m a soldier Marching heavens bound.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I’m living for Jesus for a long time I’m not tired yet.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, I’m not tired, I’m not tired, I’m not tired yet
